action_scenario: sitting on the edge of a fountain in a public square, full-body shot, face visible

base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional man in their forties, of Middle Eastern descent, with long curly hair and light blue eyes, a relaxed expression. warm afternoon sunlight. a textured beige wall. Realistic skin texture, natural pores, no makeup, no glasses, no jewelry, no text, no watermark, sharp focus on the face. This is a fictional character — do not generate a real or named person.

lookalikes.prompt: Full-body shot of a man in his early 40s, sitting on the edge of a classical stone fountain in a bustling public square, facing forward with a warm, subtle smile. He has a warm olive complexion, subtle fine lines around the eyes, and a slightly longer, more rectangular face with moderately prominent cheekbones and a strong, square jawline. His dark brown, medium-length, wavy hair is full and lightly tousled, with no visible recession. His eyes are deep-set, dark brown, and round, with thick, straight, dark eyebrows. His nose is aquiline with a narrow bridge. His lips are thin and straight. He has a full, salt-and-pepper beard and mustache, neatly trimmed. His features suggest a Mediterranean heritage. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.

A man in his early 40s sits casually on the edge of a classical stone fountain in a bustling European public square. He has a warm, olive complexion with subtle sun-kissed undertones and a few fine lines around his eyes. His face is rectangular with a softly angled jawline and prominent cheekbones. His dark brown hair is short, tightly coiled curls, with a natural, slightly messy part. His eyes are a striking light blue, deeply set, and round. His eyebrows are thick and dark, with a flatter, straighter shape. His nose is aquiline with a narrow bridge. His lips are thinner with a defined philtrum. He sports a full, well-groomed beard and mustache, dark brown with noticeable salt-and-pepper graying throughout. He has a gentle, thoughtful expression, gazing slightly off-camera. Full body shot, face clearly visible. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
